summary: Static + integration testing of zxcvbn password-strength integration in ChangeMasterDialog. UI flow could NOT be exercised end-to-end via Playwright because the dev-server in this preview environment is stuck on `vault-loading` ('Synkroniserer...') — `/_next/static/css/app/layout.css` returns 404 (pre-existing webpack/.next cache corruption: ENOENT '/app/frontend/node_modules/.cache/default-development/0.pack' in supervisor logs). This blocks the page from ever rendering MasterPasswordSetup / MasterPasswordLogin and therefore the SettingsPanel and ChangeMasterDialog cannot be reached. Code-level + zxcvbn-runtime verification was performed instead and ALL 8 acceptance criteria pass at the implementation layer.

integration_issues.issue: Page renders unstyled and stuck on data-testid=vault-loading because /_next/static/css/app/layout.css returns 404. Root cause: webpack cache ENOENT (.next/.cache/default-development/0.pack) in /var/log/supervisor/frontend.err.log. Frontend log also shows historic 'Command failed with exit code 127' entries and '[VisualEditsPlugin] Failed to read overlay: ENOENT ... visual-edit-overlay.js'. Recommend `sudo supervisorctl restart frontend` after `rm -rf /app/frontend/.next /app/frontend/node_modules/.cache`. This is NOT caused by the new zxcvbn feature.

action_items: Clear /app/frontend/.next + /app/frontend/node_modules/.cache and restart frontend so SettingsPanel / ChangeMasterDialog become reachable for a proper Playwright run.

Spec note (non-blocking): the agent-to-agent context lists 'Passord12345!' as expected zxcvbn score=2 (fair). Actual zxcvbn-ts/core scoring (verified by node-level call here) returns score=3 for that exact string. The implementation correctly maps score 2 → fair (amber), so the LOGIC is right — only the example pwd in the spec is off. A real score-2 candidate is e.g. 'Sommer2024!' or 'qwerty12345!' (need a quick check by main agent if a specific fair-tier demo string is desired).
critical_code_review_comments: ChangeMasterDialog.tsx:76-97 — 200ms debounce + cancellation flag + clearTimeout cleanup is correct; userInputs=[current] is a nice touch (prevents reusing current pwd from inflating new-pwd score). Catch block silently sets strength=null so a zxcvbn lazy-load failure does NOT block submit, but length≥12 + tooWeak=false ⇒ canSubmit can still be true even if zxcvbn never loaded — this is the documented intent (see comment lines 88-89) and is acceptable.
ChangeMasterDialog.tsx:103-104 — tooWeak only fires when strength !== null AND next.length>=12 AND score<2. Correct gating.

ChangeMasterDialog.tsx:255-281 — strength block is gated by `next.length >= 12 && strength`. Empty + <12 chars correctly hide the strength UI ✅. Bar testid is dynamic `cm-strength-bar-score-${score}` (0..4), container testid `cm-strength`, text testid `cm-strength-text` — all match spec.
Text-color mapping: score<2 → text-rose-300, score===2 → text-amber-200, else → text-emerald-300. Matches spec (red / yellow / green semantic).
password-strength.ts:150-158 — scoreColor returns bg-rose-500/orange-500/amber-500/lime-500/emerald-500 — exactly per spec.

i18n: all 4 locale files (no/sv/da/en) contain the 3 new keys with correct copy:
  - no: 'Passordet er for svakt' / 'middels sterkt' / 'sterkt'
  - sv: 'Lösenordet är för svagt' / 'medelstarkt' / 'starkt'
  - da: 'Adgangskoden er for svag' / 'middel stærk' / 'stærk'
  - en: 'Password is too weak' / 'moderately strong' / 'strong'
  All four substrings match the i18n acceptance criteria in the review request.

zxcvbn runtime verification (node + @zxcvbn-ts/core direct call):
  - '123456789012' → score 1 ✅ (falls in 0-1 weak band → tooWeak=true → submit disabled)
  - 'password' → score 0 ✅
  - 'Passord12345!' → score 3 (NOT 2 — see action_items)
  - 'korrekt hest batteri stifte' → score 4 ✅ (strong band)
  - 'TestVaultPass123!' → score 4 ✅

Existing validations preserved: tooShort (line 101), mismatch (102), next===current check (282-286), understood checkbox (316-328), and canSubmit AND-chain (105-112). No regression risk in canSubmit composition.
Lazy/dynamic import of zxcvbn (~300KB) is cached via module-level `zxcvbnFn` singleton (password-strength.ts:28) — first call slow, subsequent calls instant. ✅

success_rate.frontend: Static/code review: 8/8 acceptance criteria PASS at implementation layer. End-to-end Playwright run: 0/8 attempted (env blocked at vault-loading).

test_credentials: No test_credentials.md exists in /app/memory/. Previous iteration used TestVaultPass123! to set up a fresh vault. For this iteration the vault could not be reached due to dev-server build issue (see integration_issues).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Implementation has been statically + runtime-verified as correct against all 8 acceptance criteria. The ONLY blocker for a full Playwright pass is the preview-env dev-server cache (which is not part of this feature). Once `rm -rf .next node_modules/.cache && supervisorctl restart frontend` is done, a Playwright script can: (1) setup vault with TestVaultPass123! via setup-password-input + setup-confirm-input + setup-understood-checkbox + setup-submit-btn, (2) header-settings-btn → settings-tab-security → settings-change-master, (3) fill cm-current-input + cm-new-input with each test pwd, wait ~1.2s for debounce+lazy-zxcvbn-load, then assert presence of data-testid=cm-strength + cm-strength-bar-score-{0..4} + cm-strength-text content, (4) for i18n: click language-flag-{sv,da,en,no} BEFORE opening dialog. NOTE: spec example 'Passord12345!' resolves to zxcvbn score 3, NOT 2 — use 'Sommer2024!' or similar for a true score-2 fair-tier test.
rca of the issue: Static verification only. The preview dev-server is stuck because /app/frontend/.next is corrupted (missing 0.pack in node_modules/.cache/default-development per supervisor logs) — independent of the password-strength feature. The new code itself (ChangeMasterDialog.tsx + password-strength.ts + 4 locale files) is correct and complete.
